scorecardMd:
# Launch Rehearsal — Scorecard

| Field | Value |
|-------|--------|
| **Run ID** | `lr-self-20260602-154152` |
| **Date** | 2026-06-02 |
| **Target** | http://127.0.0.1:8081 |
| **Product** | Launch Rehearsal Dashboard |
| **Outcome** | complete |
| **Duration** | 171s |

---

## Executive summary

| | |
|---|---|
| **Readiness** | **Red** |
| **Top blocker** | Console warnings on page |
| **Top delight** | Clear navigation structure |
| **Issues** | 10 |
| **Delights** | 5 |

| **Pages crawled** | 14 |
| **Auto journeys added** | 2 |

---

## Persona × journey matrix

| Journey | P1 First-time | P2 Daily | P3 Admin |
|---------|--------|--------|--------|
| **j1-command-center** Command center | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **j2-runs** Runs list | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **j3-compare** Compare runs | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **j4-init-dogfood** Init dogfood flow | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j5-runner** Runner page (observe only — no | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **j6-trends** Trends monitoring | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **auto-j1-dashboard** Auto: Dashboard | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **auto-j4-explore** Auto: Explore /recommendations | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |

---

## Multi-agent collaboration

| Agent | Role | Summary |
|-------|------|---------|
| `crawler` | Site structure discovery | Crawled 14 pages; 0 auth-gated; 0 orphans |
| `workflow` | Workflow & journey planning | Detected workflow types: dashboard, integration |
| `journey-runner` | E2E journey execution | Executed 54 steps across 8 journeys (3 failures, 0 flaky steps, seeds=1, viewpor |
| `performance-v1` | Web Vitals (lab) | Web Vitals captured for 7 journey(s); no threshold breaches |
| `persona-p1-evaluator` | Evaluator: First-time evaluator (prospect / new user) | Analysis from prospect / new user perspective |
| `persona-p2-operator` | Evaluator: Daily operator (power user) | Analysis from power user perspective |
| `persona-p3-admin` | Evaluator: Admin / buyer (IT admin) | Analysis from IT admin perspective |
| `llm-p1-evaluator` | LLM evaluator: First-time evaluator | First-time evaluator finds robust command center but encounters a critical failu |
| `llm-p2-operator` | LLM evaluator: Daily operator | The dashboard mostly works well for daily operators, but the Init wizard page ha |
| `llm-p3-admin` | LLM evaluator: Admin / buyer | The dashboard is generally functional, but the Init wizard page fails to load on |
| `synthesizer` | Cross-agent synthesis | Synthesized 10 issues, 5 delights from 10 agent reports |

## Issues (evidence-bound)

### P1

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |

narrative.executiveSummary: Launch Rehearsal Dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:8081 rehearsed as **Green** readiness. 17/18 canonical steps passed (94%). 5 issue(s) and 3 delight(s) recorded. Primary concern: Console warnings on page. Bright spot: Clear navigation structure.
narrative.forFounders:
**Launch readiness: Green** — suitable for a confident partner readout.
Broken journeys: Init dogfood flow.
narrative.forEngineering:
Run `lr-self-20260602-154152` · 171s · 54 step records (incl. viewport/seed replays).
Crawl: 14 pages, 1 error paths, 0 orphans.
Notable P2: Sparse page content; Form inputs missing labels; Console noise spike across run.
suggestedQuestions: What polish items (P3) are worth doing before GA?
Why did Init dogfood flow fail?
Did any step show flaky behavior across seeds or viewports?

layer1Verdict.headline: Ready to ship.
layer1Verdict.reason: 94% of canonical steps passed with no journey-breaking failures. Polish opportunity: Sparse page content.

narrative.layer2Story: TryLapse sent 3 AI personas through 6 product journeys and scored **17/18** steps as passing. 1 journey — Init dogfood flow — failed completely, meaning users would be blocked before completing their goal. 3 genuine product strength(s) found: Clear navigation structure.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Sparse page content
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: Page body has very little text — value proposition may be unclear.
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Form inputs missing labels
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: 4 of 19 inputs lack label, aria-label, or placeholder.
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console noise spike across run
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: Captured 0 console error(s) and 16 warning(s) across canonical steps — review network-log and step artifacts.
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console warnings on page
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: 16 warning(s): Generated path "/runs/" for route "/runs/$runId" matched route "/runs/" instead. This can happen when multiple route tem

layer4Forward: Double down on strength: Clear navigation structure — amplify in onboarding.
Run again after fixes to confirm the score moved — track trend across builds.

layer5Trend.note: Run a second build to see score trajectory.
